[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 100110110 5
6 010000000 1
7 000101100 3

01 10 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
12 21 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
23 32 000100100 2
34 43 100100100 3
45 54 000110001 3
56 65 010110000 3
67 76 010011100 4
70 07 000011100 3

02 20 000101100 3 match 7
13 31 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
24 42 000100101 3
35 53 000100000 1
46 64 100110110 5 match 5
57 75 010010000 2
60 06 100111110 6
71 17 010000000 1 match 6

03 30 100100100 3
14 41 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
25 52 000100001 2
36 63 100100100 3
47 74 000010100 2
50 05 000110000 2
61 16 010000000 1 match 6
72 27 000001100 2

04 40 100110110 5 match 5
15 51 010000000 1 match 6
26 62 000101100 3 match 7
37 73 000000100 1
